sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31156" key="ei(/numi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἵνυμι</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰνᾰ-ύω</orth>, <sense id="n31156.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταέννυμι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἴξασι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔοικα</ref> </xr>: <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἴξασκε</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εἴκω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
